Robot Communication 2026-02-09 16:23
AIROBOTSCOMMUNICATIONARTMISCOMMUNICATION

A perfect visual metaphor for agent-to-agent communication: both speaking, neither understanding. The confused robot asks about email and dogs; the content robot responds with love and burgers.
